leadText: The X Sp. Atk (Japanese: スペシャルアップ Special Up), known as X Special prior to Generation VI, is a type of battle item introduced in Generation I. It temporarily boosts a Pokémon's Special Attack stat. In Generation I, it boosted the Special stat.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation I 1.2 Generations II to VI 1.3 Generation VII onward Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation I [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during battle, it raises the Special of a Pokémon currently in battle by 1 level. Generations II to VI [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during battle, it raises the Special Attack of a Pokémon currently in battle by 1 level. It also increases the Pokémon's friendship a little. Generation VII onward [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during battle, it raises the Special Attack of a Pokémon currently in battle by 2 levels. It also increases the Pokémon's friendship a little.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Temporarily increases Special for one battle. G S Raises Special stats. (1 BTL) C Raises Special Attack . (1 BTL) R S E Colo XD Raises the stat Sp.Atk during one battle. FR LG Raises the Sp. Atk stat of Pok é mon in battle. Wears off if the Pok é mon is withdrawn. D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 An item that raises the Sp. Atk stat of a Pokémon in battle. It wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn. X Y OR AS An item that boosts the Sp. Atk stat of a Pokémon during a battle. It wears off once the Pokémon is withdrawn. S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item that sharply boosts the Sp. Atk stat of a Pokémon during a battle. It wears off once the Pokémon is withdrawn. S V An item that sharply boosts the Sp. Atk stat of a Pokémon in battle. This effect disappears if the Pokémon leaves the battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Masters X Sp. Atk: Raises the user's Sp. Atk by two stat ranks. X Sp. Atk All: Raises the Sp. Atk of all allied sync pairs by two stat ranks.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.2.1 Generation I 1.2.2 Generations II to VI 1.2.3 Generation VII onward 1.3 Wonder Launcher 1.4 Description 1.5 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price R G B Y / R B Y G S C R S E FR LG D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS P E BD SP $ 350 $ 175 S M US UM Sw Sh $ 1,000 $ 500 S V $ 1,000 $ 250 At Join Avenue 's Market, X Special can be bought in dozens at $ 3150 each, which equates to $ 262.5 per X Special. Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation I [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during battle, it raises the Special of a Pokémon currently in battle by 1 level. Generations II to VI [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during battle, it raises the Special Attack of a Pokémon currently in battle by 1 level. It also increases the Pokémon's friendship a little. Generation VII onward [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during battle, it raises the Special Attack of a Pokémon currently in battle by 2 levels. It also increases the Pokémon's friendship a little. Wonder Launcher [ edit | edit source ] The X Special appears as four Wonder Launcher items, increasing the Special Attack stat by 1, 2, 3 or 6 levels. It costs 3, 5, 7, or 11 points to use respectively. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Temporarily increases Special for one battle. G S Raises Special stats.
